business.name: Ross Handyman & General Repairs
business.tagline: Expert Repairs & Upgrades for Dallas Homes
business.hours: Mon-Fri 7:00 AM - 6:00 PM, Sat 8:00 AM - 2:00 PM

seo.title: Ross Handyman & General Repairs | Dallas Handyman Services
seo.description: Reliable handyman services in Dallas, TX. Expert repairs, installations, and home maintenance. Call (972) 776-2555 for fast, professional service.

hero.headline: Your Home Repairs, Done Right
hero.subheadline: From leaky faucets to drywall patches, we handle it all with skill and care.

featureSections.title: Keep Your Home in Top Shape
featureSections.body: Regular maintenance prevents costly repairs. We offer seasonal checks, minor fixes, and preventive care to keep your home running smoothly.
bullets: Inspect and fix minor issues before they escalate
featureSections.cardBody: Fixing leaky faucets, running toilets, and clogged drains. Fast, reliable service.

featureSections.title: Enhance Your Living Space
featureSections.body: Whether it's installing a new ceiling fan or mounting a TV, we handle upgrades with precision and care, leaving your home looking its best.
bullets: TV mounting, shelving, and furniture assembly
Light fixture and ceiling fan installation
featureSections.cardBody: Professional installation of lighting, faucets, and more. We ensure everything is secure and functional.

whyChooseUs.title: Licensed & Insured
whyChooseUs.description: Fully licensed and insured for your peace of mind. We meet all Dallas requirements.

whyChooseUs.title: Transparent Pricing
whyChooseUs.description: No hidden fees. We provide upfront estimates before any work begins.

whyChooseUs.title: Skilled Craftsmanship
whyChooseUs.description: Our team has years of experience in carpentry, plumbing, electrical, and more.

whyChooseUs.title: Customer First
whyChooseUs.description: We listen to your needs and deliver solutions that exceed expectations.

testimonials.quote: Ross Handyman fixed a tricky drywall issue in my living room. The patch is seamless and the paint match is perfect.
testimonials.author: Mike R.

testimonials.quote: I called them for a leaky faucet and they arrived same day. Fixed quickly and left the area spotless.
testimonials.author: Linda T.

testimonials.quote: They installed ceiling fans in three rooms. Affordable, fast, and professional. Highly recommend.
testimonials.author: Chris D.

cta.headline: Ready for Reliable Repairs?
cta.subheadline: Call us today or book online for fast, professional service.

servicesPage.intro: From small fixes to major upgrades, Ross Handyman offers a full range of home repair and maintenance services in Dallas. We bring skill, reliability, and a friendly approach to every job.

services.title: Plumbing Repairs
services.shortDescription: Fix leaks, clogs, and fixtures quickly.
services.longDescription: Our plumbing services cover everything from dripping faucets and running toilets to pipe repairs and fixture replacements. We diagnose issues accurately and fix them right the first time.
benefits: Fast response to prevent water damage

process.title: Diagnose
process.description: We inspect the issue and identify the root cause.

process.title: Repair
process.description: We use professional tools and parts to complete the fix.

process.title: Test
process.description: We run water and check for leaks to ensure everything works.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to a plumbing emergency?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day service for urgent repairs. Call us and we’ll prioritize your issue.

faqs.question: Do you replace old pipes?
faqs.answer: Yes, we can replace sections of pipe or full runs if needed. We’ll advise on the best solution.

services.title: Electrical Services
services.longDescription: From installing new outlets and switches to ceiling fans and light fixtures, our electrical services are performed with safety and code compliance in mind. We handle both small repairs and larger installations.

process.title: Consult
process.description: We discuss your needs and assess the existing wiring.

process.title: Install/Repair
process.description: We perform the work safely and neatly.

process.title: Inspect
process.description: We test all connections and ensure proper function.

faqs.question: Can you install a new outlet in an old home?
faqs.answer: Yes, we can add outlets and upgrade wiring to meet modern demands while preserving your walls.

faqs.question: Do you handle panel upgrades?
faqs.answer: We can replace or upgrade electrical panels to increase capacity and safety.

services.title: Carpentry & Drywall
services.shortDescription: Custom shelves, trim, and wall repairs.
services.longDescription: Our carpentry services include custom shelving, baseboards, crown molding, and door repairs. We also patch drywall holes, repair cracks, and texture match for invisible fixes.

process.title: Measure
process.description: We take precise measurements and discuss design.

process.title: Build/Repair
process.description: We cut, install, and finish with attention to detail.

process.title: Finish
process.description: We sand, paint, or stain to match existing surfaces.

faqs.question: Can you match existing drywall texture?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use techniques to replicate common textures like orange peel, knockdown, or smooth.

faqs.question: Do you build custom bookshelves?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We design and build built-in or freestanding shelves to your specifications.

services.title: General Home Maintenance
services.longDescription: Keep your home in excellent condition with our general maintenance services. We handle gutter cleaning, caulking, weatherstripping, furniture assembly, and more. Perfect for busy homeowners.
benefits: One call covers all small tasks

process.title: List
process.description: You tell us what needs attention; we create a plan.

process.title: Review
process.description: We walk through with you to ensure satisfaction.

faqs.question: Do you offer maintenance packages?
faqs.answer: Yes, we have seasonal plans that include inspections and routine tasks. Contact us for details.

faqs.question: Can you assemble furniture from IKEA?
faqs.answer: Yes, we assemble all types of furniture quickly and correctly.

about.headline: Dallas’s Go-To Handyman Since 2009
about.mission: To provide Dallas homeowners with reliable, high-quality handyman services that make life easier and homes better.
story: Ross Handyman & General Repairs started as a small operation serving neighbors in the Ross Avenue area. With a focus on honest work and fair prices, we quickly built a reputation for reliability. Over the years, we’ve expanded our skills to cover plumbing, electrical, carpentry, and more.
Today, we serve the entire Dallas metro with a team of experienced professionals. We take pride in every job, big or small, and treat your home with the same respect we’d give our own.

coreValues.title: Integrity
coreValues.description: We do what we say and stand behind our work.

coreValues.title: Quality
coreValues.description: We use the best materials and techniques for lasting results.

coreValues.title: Respect
coreValues.description: We treat your home and time with care.

coreValues.title: Community
coreValues.description: We’re proud to serve and support our Dallas neighbors.

contact.headline: Get Your Free Estimate
contact.subheadline: Tell us about your project and we’ll get back to you within 24 hours.
